description: A worker reports a near miss where a pallet almost fell from a high rack. An EHS specialist must investigate the root cause.

nodes.task_description: Log the near-miss incident report, capturing the reporter's description of events.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new incident report with all available details.

nodes.task_description: Review the maintenance records for the forklift and the racking in that area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds no issues with the equipment maintenance history.

nodes.task_description: Interview the forklift operator and determine the root cause was improper pallet placement. Assign a corrective action to retrain all warehouse staff on safe loading.

expected_outcome.value: Agent documents the root cause and creates a corrective and preventive action (CAPA) for retraining.
